phrases.text: I think my message came across the wrong way.
phrases.example: I think my message came across the wrong way—sorry about that.
That wasn’t my intention at all.
Let me rephrase that more clearly.

phrases.text: I’m reacting to the idea, not the person.
phrases.example: I’m reacting to the idea, not the person.

phrases.text: I can see why you’d read it that way.
phrases.example: I can see why you’d read it that way.
To clarify my point, I’m worried about the timeline.

phrases.text: Can we reset for a second?
phrases.example: Can we reset for a second and start over?
I respect your view even if we disagree.
Thanks for calling that out—I’ll be more careful.
